message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

package "UI" {
    component RegisterPharmacyUI
}

package "Data" {
    component DataHandler {
        +openConnection()
        +closeAll()
    }
    component PharmacyDB {
        +PharmacyDB()
        +registerPharmacy()
    }
}

package "Controller" {
    component RegisterPharmacyController {
        +newPharmacy(managerName, email, password, nif, name, latitude, longitude, streetName, doorNumber, postalCode, locality, country)
        +registerPharmacy()
    }
}

package "Model" {
    package "Service" {
        component PharmacyService {
            +PharmacyService()
            +addPharmacy(name, pharmacyManager, latitude, longitude, streetName, doorNumber, postalCode, locality, country)
            +registerPharmacy()
        }
    }

    component Address {
        -String streetName
        -String doorNumber
        -String postalCode
        -String locality
        -String country
        -float longitude
        -float latitude
    }

    component Pharmacy {
        -int id
        -String name
        -String email
    }

    component ScooterPark {
        -int maxSlotsNumber
    }

    component DronePark {
        -int maxSlotsNumber
    }

    component ScooterChargingSlot {
        -int id
        -float outputPower
    }

    component ScooterParkingSlot {
        -int id
    }

    component DroneChargingSlot {
        -int id
        -float outputPower
    }

    component DroneParkingSlot {
        -int id
    }
}

component DataHandler
component PharmacyDB
database Database

RegisterPharmacyUI ..> RegisterPharmacyController
RegisterPharmacyController ..> PharmacyService
PharmacyService --> PharmacyDB : uses
PharmacyService --> Pharmacy : manages services of
PharmacyDB --|> DataHandler
PharmacyDB --> Database : manages
Database --> Pharmacy : has registered
Database --> ScooterPark : has registered
Database --> DronePark : has registered
Database --> ScooterChargingSlot : has registered
Database --> ScooterParkingSlot : has registered
Database --> DroneChargingSlot : has registered
Database --> DroneParkingSlot : has registered
Pharmacy --> Address : has
ScooterPark --> ScooterChargingSlot : has
ScooterPark --> ScooterParkingSlot : has
DronePark --> DroneChargingSlot : has
DronePark --> DroneParkingSlot : has
```
